title: Pan-Seared Trout with Bitter Portuguese Glaze
description: A simple and flavorful dish that showcases the sweet and tangy flavors of Portugal paired with the delicate taste of trout.
instructions: Season the trout fillets with salt and pepper.
Heat a skillet over medium-high heat and add a small amount of oil.
Sear the trout for 2-3 minutes on each side, then transfer to a baking sheet.
Bake the trout in the preheated oven for 8-10 minutes, or until cooked through.
While the trout is baking, combine the chopped bitter, orange juice, and chopped roast in a small saucepan.
Bring the mixture to a simmer over medium heat and cook for 5-7 minutes, or until the glaze has thickened.
Remove the trout from the oven and brush the bitter Portuguese glaze over the top of each fillet.
Serve the trout hot, garnished with additional bitter if desired.
